---
id: send-order-items-using-put
title: "Mark order as sent"
description: "Requires <b>applications.order.ship_deliver</b> authority for authenticated user"
sidebar_label: "Mark order as sent"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "put api-method"
info_path: docs/api/eshopReference/hc-oneclick-api-installments
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Mark order as sent"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"put"}
  path={"/financing/v1/applications/{uuid}/order/send"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Requires <b>applications.order.ship_deliver</b> authority for authenticated user

When the whole order was shipped to the customer, use `/financing/v1/applications/{applicationId}/order/send` 
resource where `{applicationId}` is the application ID you received in the response of `/financing/v1/applications` after its creation.

| Financing type | Supported            |
| ----------- | --------------- |
| `INSTALLMENT`         | YES  |

| Application state | Availability            |
| ----------- | --------------- |
| `PROCESSING`         | NO  |
| `REJECTED`         | NO  |
| `CANCELLED`         | NO  |
| `READY`         | YES (* available only when `Application.stateReason = READY_TO_SHIP`)  |

If the request was successfully processed, you receive HTTP status code 200 and object 
of information about changed order plus basic information about respective application 
(ID, state, substate) with at least following information in the response:

- Order number
- Order total price (including VAT)
- Order items (array)
  - Order item name
  - Total price (all pieces, including VAT)
  - Order item state
- Order state
- Application basic information
  - ID
  - Application state
  - Application substate

In other cases, you receive one of the following errors:

| Status code | Code            | Explanation          |
| ----------- | --------------- | -------------------- |
| 400         | INVALID_REQUEST  | Request was not well formatted (malformed request syntax, size too large, etc.) |
| 404         | OBJECT_NOT_FOUND  | The requested resource could not be found |
| 422         | NOT_SUPPORTED | Resource is not supported for given financing type |
| 422         | UNPROCESSABLE | The request was well-formed but was unable to be followed due to semantic errors |
| 500         | INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR | Unexpected condition was encountered and no more specific message is suitable |


<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"name":"uuid","in":"path","description":"uuid","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string"}}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={undefined}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"OK","content":{"*/*":{"schema":{"type":"object","required":["applicationInfo","items","number","state","totalPrice"],"properties":{"applicationInfo":{"type":"object","required":["id","state"],"properties":{"id":{"type":"string","description":"Unique identifier in HCO"},"state":{"type":"string","description":"Application state.","enum":["CANCELLED","PROCESSING","READY","REJECTED"]},"stateReason":{"type":"string","description":"Describes internal state of application, e.g. when state is PROCESSING - reason why application remains in processing state","enum":["CANCELLED_NOT_PAID","CANCELLED_RETURNED","CANCELLED_TO_RETURN","PROCESSING_ADDITIONAL_DATA","PROCESSING_ALT_OFFER","PROCESSING_APPROVED","PROCESSING_NEW","PROCESSING_PREAPPROVED","PROCESSING_REDIRECT_NEEDED","PROCESSING_REVIEW","PROCESSING_SIGNED","PROCESSING_VALIDATION_IN_PROGRESS","PROCESSING_VERIFICATION","READY_DELIVERED","READY_DELIVERING","READY_PAID","READY_SHIPPED","READY_TO_SHIP","REJECTED"]}},"title":"FinancingV1ApplicationBase"},"deliveryDate":{"type":"string","format":"date","description":"date and time of delivery"},"deliveryTrackingNumber":{"type":"string","description":"delivery tracking number"},"deliveryType":{"type":"string","description":"delivery type, for `DELIVERY_CARRIER` type can be further specified by DeliveryCarrier attribute.Typ doruceni. Dopravcem, osobni prevzeti, online doruceni atd.","enum":["DELIVERY_CARRIER","ONLINE","PERSONAL_BRANCH","PERSONAL_BRANCH_WITH_ASSISTANCE","PERSONAL_PARTNER"]},"items":{"type":"array","description":"order items","items":{"type":"object","required":["name","state","totalPrice"],"properties":{"code":{"type":"string","description":"internal code for item (internal to e-shop). Used to better identify the item for future changes","minLength":0,"maxLength":100},"deliveryDate":{"type":"string","format":"date","description":"date when item was delivered. Only when the whole order was NOT sent at once."},"deliveryTrackingNumber":{"type":"string","description":"Tracking number for the item. Only when the whole order was NOT sent at once."},"state":{"type":"string","enum":["CANCELLED","DELIVERED","PROCESSING","RETURNED","SENT"]},"totalPrice":{"type":"object","required":["amount","currency"],"properties":{"amount":{"type":"number","description":"Amount in decimal format"},"currency":{"type":"string","description":"Amount currency. ISO 4217"}},"title":"FinancingV1Amount"},"type":{"type":"string","description":"item type","enum":["DIGITAL","DISCOUNT","FEE","GIFT_CARD","INSURANCE","PHYSICAL","SALES_TAX","SHIPPING_FEE","STORE_CREDIT"]},"unitPrice":{"type":"object","required":["amount","currency"],"properties":{"amount":{"type":"number","description":"Amount in decimal format"},"currency":{"type":"string","description":"Amount currency. ISO 4217"}},"title":"FinancingV1Amount"}},"title":"FinancingV1OrderItem"}},"number":{"type":"string","description":"order number (internal for e-shop)"},"reservationDate":{"type":"string","format":"date-time","description":"Date and time until order is reserved. After this date, e-shop does not guarantee items availability (if application processing is longer, it may endanger order fullfillment)."},"sentDate":{"type":"string","format":"date","description":"date and time of order shipping"},"state":{"type":"string","description":"Order state","enum":["CANCELLED","DELIVERED","PROCESSING","RETURNED","SENT"]},"totalPrice":{"type":"object","required":["amount","currency"],"properties":{"amount":{"type":"number","description":"Amount in decimal format"},"currency":{"type":"string","description":"Amount currency. ISO 4217"}},"title":"FinancingV1Amount"},"variableSymbols":{"type":"array","description":"variable symbols (internal for e-shop)","items":{"type":"string"}}},"title":"FinancingV1OrderExtended"}}}},"201":{"description":"Created"},"401":{"description":"Unauthorized"},"403":{"description":"Forbidden"},"404":{"description":"Not Found"}}}
>
